greeting: ^Mira: Oh! A real party! I thought I was alone in this ruin.
^Mira: I am Mira — herbalist, reluctant adventurer. I followed rumours of rare fungi and now I cannot leave.
^Mira: The lower floors are thick with bioluminescent mushrooms. Glowing ones — three would be enough for my best restorative formula.
^Mira: If you bring me three Glowing Mushrooms from the Warrens below, I will give you something worth more than gold.
^Mira: In the meantime — I have potions. Supplies. Take what you need, within reason.
mushroom_reminder: ^Mira: Still looking for those mushrooms? Three Glowing Mushrooms from the Fungal Warrens.
^Mira: I have set up a small camp on the second floor as well — find me there once you have them.
